name: grok
description: Grok as a peer implementer for Claude Code: default integration=direct lands consented live-tree edits for one-shot code (ACP peer always external worktree; stop-time apply); auto/review are opt-in worktrees; ACP is the default peer channel (runMode direct is a separate installed-home security posture). Review, reason, verify, continue-run, and verified handoff included. See plugin/references/integration-modes.md. Not affiliated with xAI.

runMode.title: Run mode
runMode.description: Security posture (orthogonal to integration): hardened (default; private home + sandbox) or direct (installed Grok CLI / normal home). Not how edits land - see integrationMode and plugin/references/integration-modes.md.

integrationMode.title: Integration mode
integrationMode.description: How edits land (orthogonal to runMode): direct = consented default (one-shot code live-tree; ACP peer stop-time apply after always-external worktree); auto/review = opt-in worktrees. userConfig is a hint only - setup consent still required. SSOT: plugin/references/integration-modes.md.

notificationMode.title: Completion notifications
notificationMode.description: off, auto (background runs only), native, or webhook
